markets.rules_secondary: Video of the remarks to the Shield of Americas Summit will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, transcripts of the remarks to the Shield of Americas Summit will be used according to the news publications listed in the contract. Plural nouns used as or within a proper nouns (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included. Please see full rules for more details. For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. If this event is not opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event this market will resolve to no. Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
